name: ghostlogic-agent-watchdog
description: Monitors local AI-agent coding sessions, including Codex CLI and Claude Code, and ships tamper-evident work receipts to Blackbox.

interface.shortDescription: Monitors local AI-agent coding sessions, including Codex CLI and Claude Code, and ships tamper-evident work receipts to Blackbox.
interface.longDescription: GhostLogic Agent Watchdog uses the logicd capture engine to monitor local AI-agent coding sessions, including Codex CLI and Claude Code, seal them into deterministic batches, preserve replay-safe durability, and ship tamper-evident work receipts to GhostLogic Blackbox.
defaultPrompt: Install GhostLogic Agent Watchdog on this machine and show me the generated service steps.
Explain how GhostLogic Agent Watchdog preserves supported agent transcript durability.
Audit this GhostLogic Agent Watchdog config for risky settings before I deploy it.
